case_title: JOLINO JEWELERS VS BENITEZ ZOILA YADIRA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $490.70 FILED BY JOLINO JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT BENITEZ ZOILA YADIRA AGUILAR DAISI M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BENITEZ ZOILA YADIRA
INVALID SERVICE ON DEFEND, ZOILA M. AGUILAR, NOT NAMED ON CLAIM. SENT TO PROCESS SERVER FOR CORRECTION, CAME BACK NO SUCH NUMBER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOLINO JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENITEZ ZOILA YADIRA $490.70 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $536.20 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
